posts.author: TraceJackson (Trace Jackson)
posts.cookedHtml:
It would be really nice to be able to take mass action on Board, like:

  • Moving multiple Boards from one Workspace to another
  • Changing Board types
  • Adding Members or Owners to multiple Boards

This would be helpful when we have staff changeover, process changes, etc.
I’m already finding it laborious to make Board changes one by one when I’ve got 2-3 dozen Boards that need to be effected.
